human_review_items.summary: Commit b4583b4 ('Remove CRS/operation nudges from 5 CRS task prompts') mis-describes its effect on this FIO task: it removed the geometry_wkt-drop and row-count output-schema sentences, not a CRS nudge. Audit the rest of that 5-task sweep. Carried forward from prior blocks.

Instruction does not state 'drop geometry_wkt' but grader subcheck no_residual_geometry_wkt_column checks for its absence; 'all other columns as string' can even read as keep-everything. Inferable-convention conclusion stands; under the 2026-06-14 per-task weights this cosmetic miss docks only ~0.04. Optional: re-add the drop sentence. Carried forward.
